// java.lang is imported implicitly, so System.Logger written without any
// import is the same JDK type - the scoped-type spelling counts as tier-1
// exactly like the imported one, for the receiver and the Level alike.
class SystemLoggerScopedType {
    private static final System.Logger log = System.getLogger("x");

    void errorReports() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            log.log(System.Logger.Level.ERROR, "failed", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
